creator: astounding@gmail.com
text:
portupgrade won't build under Ruby 1.9.1 due to including Ruby globals in the parameters section of option blocks.  The fix is very simple.

Simple fix:
===========
..option code... {
  |$globalvar|

Becomes:
========
..option code... {
  |opt|
  $globalvar = opt

Fix: PATCH FOLLOWS:
How-To-Repeat: see above
